content:
📌 Version 6.9 – Expanded Professor Roles & Abilities, Faustian Bargains, and Adding Chaos to the Observer Role


🚀 This iteration deepens the professor’s weekly role by expanding available actions, introduces a structured Faustian Bargain mechanic, and ensures the Observer role subtly influences the game.

📜 1. Expanded Professor Roles – More Abilities Per Archetype

📜 Each professor role now has three distinct abilities per week, allowing for more dynamic class engagement.

✔ Every week, the professor selects (or is assigned) one of five roles.
✔ Each role has one primary ability, one secondary ability, and one passive effect.
✔ Some abilities directly impact students, while others affect gameplay mechanics.

📖 Professor Roles & Their Abilities
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 365 (chunk 365/555)
